failure_modes.text: Boiling the ocean can turn decomposition into exhaustive branch collection that obscures the answer instead of sharpening it.
failure_modes.mitigation: Stop branching when the next level of detail no longer changes the conclusion; exhaustive decomposition obscures instead of sharpens.

failure_modes.text: A familiar framework can impose a false pattern on a novel problem and send the tree down the wrong cut.
failure_modes.mitigation: Challenge the framework's fit before applying it: if the cut was borrowed from a different problem type, it may impose a false pattern.

failure_modes.text: Motivated decomposition can structure the tree to justify the preferred answer instead of discovering the true drivers.
failure_modes.mitigation: Check whether the tree structure leads to the truth or toward a preferred answer; motivated decomposition hides behind logical-looking branches.

premortem_questions.text: What is the single, core purpose we are trying to achieve with this decomposition?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What is the single, core purpose we are trying to achieve with this decomposition?

premortem_questions.text: What assumptions are embedded in this chosen framework or logic tree?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What assumptions are embedded in this chosen framework/logic tree?

premortem_questions.text: Are we breaking down symptoms, or are we identifying the key drivers that are truly under our control?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Are we breaking down symptoms, or are we identifying the key drivers that are truly under our control?

heuristics.text: Use mutually exclusive, collectively exhaustive branches so the parts stay distinct while covering the whole.
Build logic trees and issue pyramids so claims, analyses, and supporting branches stay structurally connected.
Use plain-English explanation to reveal whether the current decomposition actually makes the concept manageable.

curation_notes.summary: The source is chunk-rich on branch discipline, key-driver focus, and decomposition failure modes, so the Wave 2 file stays close to those themes.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor issue-tree libraries or broad consulting examples because the raw source already gives stronger structural intervention content.
open_questions: The second premortem question is lightly normalized to remove the slash while preserving the same source meaning.

allies: The raw ally section is strong on systems thinking, prioritization, hypothesis-driven work, and synthesis.
antagonists: The raw antagonist section is useful later relation material around first-principles-thinking and big-picture loss.
structured_tensions: No explicit structured tension block is present in the raw source.
